news.headline: Marpai completes $700,000 private placement, revolutionizing $22 billion TPA market.
news.summary: In Tampa, Florida on December 5, 2024, Marpai, Inc. (OTCQX: MRAI), a tech platform company, is making waves as a national Third-Party Administrator (TPA) aiming to disrupt the $22 billion TPA market with its cost-effective solutions.

news.headline: QIAGEN's EZ2 Connect sample preparation instrument reaches 1,000 placements globally, contributing to total of 5,500 EZ series instruments.
news.summary: In Venlo, Netherlands, QIAGEN revealed a milestone achievement with over 1,000 installations of the EZ2 Connect automated sample preparation equipment, an upgrade from the EZ1 line. Introduced in 2021, the enhanced EZ2 Connect has rapidly become a top instrument for sample preparation and data handling, adding to a grand total of more than 5,500 EZ series instruments distributed worldwide. This development underscores the instrument's successful adoption and strong market position.

news.headline: Hewlett Packard Enterprise announced Q4 2024 results: record revenue, exceeding full-year commitments for revenue, EPS, free cash flow.
news.summary: In Houston today, Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE: HPE) reported their financial outcomes for the fourth quarter ending October 31, 2024. CEO Antonio Neri expressed satisfaction with the results, highlighting record revenue for the quarter and a successful fiscal year 2024. The company surpassed its yearly goals for revenue, EPS, and free cash flow. Neri credited this achievement to their unique offerings in hybrid cloud, artificial intelligence, and networking, signaling further advancements ahead.

news.headline: Decipher Prostate Test by Veracyte is now the sole gene expression test endorsed in NCCN® Prostate Cancer guidelines.
news.summary: A company based in South San Francisco, California, recently announced that Veracyte's Decipher Prostate Test has become the sole gene expression test endorsed in the NCCN® Prostate Cancer Guidelines. This recommendation solidifies the test's position as the preferred option for patients. This development signifies a significant milestone for Veracyte as they continue to lead in this area.

news.headline: Bill Staples becomes new CEO of GitLab (NASDAQ: GTLB) as Sid Sijbrandij steps down; Sijbrandij to be executive chair.
news.summary: In San Francisco, GitLab Inc., a prominent AI-driven DevSecOps platform traded on the NASDAQ as GTLB, revealed that Bill Staples has been appointed as the new CEO and board member starting today. Staples takes over from Sid Sijbrandij, the co-founder and previous CEO, who is stepping down from his daily responsibilities to prioritize his health. Concurrently, Sijbrandij will shift into the position of executive chair of GitLab's board of directors. This move aims to ensure a smooth transition within the company's leadership structure.

news.headline: Domo reports fiscal Q3 revenue of $79.8M, subscription revenue $71.1M, billings $73.4M, and Subscription RPO of $354.1M.
news.summary: Domo, Inc. released its fiscal third quarter results for the period ending October 31, 2024. The company reported total revenue of $79.8 million, with subscription revenue accounting for $71.1 million. Billings for the quarter reached $73.4 million. The Subscription Remaining Performance Obligations (RPO) stood at $354.1 million as of October 31, 2024, marking a 3% year-over-year increase. Additionally, the subscription RPO anticipated to be recognized beyond twelve months amounted to $145.9 million as of the same date.

news.headline: Rubrik to present at Barclays Global Technology Conference in San Francisco on December 11, 2024 at 4:15 p.m. PT. Webcast available.
news.summary: Rubrik, Inc., a Zero Trust Data Security™ Company headquartered in Palo Alto, California, revealed its upcoming participation in the Barclays Global Technology Conference. The event is set to take place in San Francisco on Wednesday, December 11, 2024, with Rubrik scheduled to present at 4:15 p.m. PT. Those interested can access the live webcast and archived presentation via the Company’s investor relations website at https://ir.rubrik.com. Rubrik, listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol RBRK, is dedicated to enhancing data security.

news.headline: PagerDuty appoints Sarah Franklin to Board of Directors, alongside Sameer Dholakia’s resignation. Franklin brings strong leadership experience to the company.
news.summary: PagerDuty, Inc. (NYSE: PD), a prominent player in digital operations management, revealed the induction of Sarah Franklin to its Board of Directors and Audit Committee. This comes alongside the departure of Sameer Dholakia from the Board to prioritize his role as a partner at Bessemer Venture Partners. Franklin, known for her success in developing distinctive brands and pioneering customer engagement initiatives, brings valuable expertise to the boardroom. With this change, Franklin joins the team as Dholakia exits for other professional commitments.

news.headline: Argan, Inc. announces Q3 fiscal 2025 results with revenues at $257 million, up $93 million from previous year.
news.summary: Argan, Inc. (NYSE: AGX) based in Rockville, Md., has reported its financial performance for the third quarter of fiscal year 2025 ending on October 31, 2024. The company will conduct an investor conference call on December 5, 2024, at 5:00 p.m. ET. In the latest quarter, revenues amounted to $257,008, showcasing a significant increase from $163,755 in the same period in 2023, representing a rise of $93,253. Additional detailed financial information will be discussed during the conference call.

news.headline: PublicSquare closed $36.2M offering of 7.8M shares at $4.63 per share. Deal finalized on Dec 5, 2024.
news.summary: PSQ Holdings, Inc. has successfully completed a registered direct offering, selling a total of 7,813,931 shares of its Class A common stock at a price of $4.63 per share. This resulted in gross proceeds of about $36.2 million for the Company. The offering was finalized on December 5, 2024, with Roth Capital Partners facilitating the transaction. PublicSquare is identified as the leading commerce and payments ecosystem in America, emphasizing values of life, family, and liberty.

news.headline: Asana reported Q3 fiscal 2025 results, ending October 31, 2024. CEO Moskovitz mentioned launch of AI Studio driving growth opportunity.
news.summary: Asana, Inc., a prominent enterprise work management platform, recently released its financial results for the third quarter of fiscal 2025 ending on October 31, 2024. The company is listed under NYSE as ASAN and LTSE as ASAN. CEO and co-founder Dustin Moskovitz expressed excitement about the introduction of AI Studio, a new category that is expected to expand the company's Total Addressable Market (TAM) and provide notable growth opportunities. Despite being in the early stages, there has been a substantial demand from customers for this new offering.

news.headline: GitLab (GTLB) reports Q3 fiscal year 2025 results, ended October 31, 2024, highlighting platform demand and growth.
news.summary: In San Francisco, GitLab Inc. (NASDAQ: GTLB) announced its financial results for the third quarter of fiscal year 2025 ending on October 31, 2024. The company highlighted significant growth, emphasizing the increasing demand for platform-oriented software development. Sid Sijbrandij, the co-founder and executive chair of GitLab Inc., expressed that their AI-powered DevSecOps platform has resonated well with customers, serving their requirements for speedy software development.

news.headline: MP Materials Corp. will join Jefferies 2024 Battery Storage & Materials Conference on Dec 13, 2024, at 2:20 pm ET. $MP #rareearth.
news.summary: In Las Vegas, MP Materials Corp. revealed that their CFO, Ryan Corbett, will be joining the Jefferies 2024 Battery Storage & Materials Conference on December 13, 2024, at 2:20 p.m. Eastern Time. This event can be accessed via live webcasts and replays on https://investors.mpmaterials.com/. MP Materials (NYSE: MP) specializes in producing essential materials for electrification and advanced technologies. Their focus is on providing materials crucial for various high-tech applications.

news.headline: Panguna Mine Legacy Impact Assessment report released by Rio Tinto, assessing environmental and social impacts after BCL ceased operations.
news.summary: In Melbourne, Australia, Rio Tinto, a part of the Panguna Mine Legacy Impact Assessment (PMLIA) Oversight Committee, has expressed support for the unveiling of the PMLIA report. This report is deemed crucial in comprehending the enduring effects of the past mine in Bougainville. The independent analysis delves into the environmental consequences and the associated social and human rights ramifications triggered by the Panguna mine post the discontinuation of operations by Bougainville Copper Limited (BCL).

news.headline: Revolution Medicines closes upsized offering, raising $862.5 million with underwriters' full exercise.
news.summary: The underwriters have fully exercised their option, bringing the total gross proceeds to $862.5 million.

news.headline: Bright Horizons named a Top Place to Work by The Boston Globe in 2024, honored in Massachusetts.
news.summary: Bright Horizons, headquartered in Newton, Massachusetts, has been recognized as one of the top workplaces in the state by The Boston Globe. This prestigious acknowledgment highlights the company's commitment to providing a positive work environment for its employees. The news was shared by Bright Horizons through a press release today.

news.headline: McRae Industries, Inc. declares $0.84 dividend per share, including a special dividend of $0.70, payable on Jan 2, 2025.
news.summary: On December 5, 2024, in Mount Gilead, North Carolina, McRae Industries, Inc. announced a dividend of $0.84 per share on their Class A and Class B Common Stock. This dividend includes a special dividend of $0.70 per share. Shareholders are set to receive the payment on January 2, 2025. The company's stocks are listed as MCRAA and MCRAB on the Pink Sheets exchange.

news.headline: Ramaco Resources, Inc. provides guidance for 2025, announces 1st quarter 2025 dividend, and details 4th quarter 2024 dividend.
news.summary: On December 5, 2024, in Lexington, Kentucky, Ramaco Resources, Inc., a prominent company listed on NASDAQ under the symbols METC and METCB, announced its position as a key player in the production of high-grade, cost-effective metallurgical coal in Central Appalachia. Ramaco also disclosed its upcoming ventures into rare earth elements and essential minerals.

news.headline: Boyd Gaming authorizes $500M for share repurchase, declares $0.17 quarterly dividend per share.
news.summary: Boyd Gaming Corporation (NYSE: BYD) has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.17 per share. The company, based in Las Vegas, disclosed on Dec. 5, 2024, that its Board of Directors approved an extra $500 million for share repurchases. This decision reflects the company's commitment to maximizing shareholder value.

news.headline: Tilly's reports best quarterly comp sales performance since fiscal 2021, positive comp sales in August, and store traffic growth.
news.summary: Tilly’s, Inc., disclosed its financial results for the third quarter of fiscal 2024, concluded on November 2, 2024. The Company reported its strongest quarterly comp sales performance since fiscal 2021, marking the first month of positive comp sales since February 2022, during fiscal August. Furthermore, the quarter saw a second consecutive increase in year-over-year store traffic. Hezy Shaked, the Co-Founder, Executive Chairman, President, and Chief Officer, emphasized these positive trends in the company's performance.

news.headline: Alexander & Baldwin, Inc. (NYSE: ALEX) raises Q4 2024 dividend to $0.225 per share from $0.2225 per share.
news.summary: Alexander & Baldwin, Inc. (NYSE: ALEX) based in Honolulu, reported on December 5, 2024, that its Board of Directors has sanctioned a higher dividend for the fourth quarter of the year. The dividend per share has been raised to $0.225 from $0.2225. The company is known as A&B and operates under the ticker symbol ALEX on the New York Stock Exchange.

news.headline: WEC Energy Group to raise dividend by 6.9% to 89.25 cents per share in Q1 2025. Board announced the increase today.
news.summary: On December 5, 2024, in Milwaukee, the board of directors of WEC Energy Group, listed as WEC on the NYSE, disclosed plans to boost the quarterly dividend for the company's common stock to 89.25 cents per share in the initial quarter of 2025, indicating a rise of 5.75...

news.headline: Utz Brands, Inc. (NYSE: UTZ) raises quarterly cash dividend from $0.236 to $0.244 per share, with a regular dividend of about $0.061 per share.
news.summary: Utz Brands, Inc., a prominent U.S. producer of branded salty snacks, recently disclosed an annual dividend rise from $0.236 to $0.244 per share. This increase is effective immediately. The Board of Directors also approved a quarterly cash dividend of around $0.061 per share for the Company's Class A Common Stock. Utz is listed as NYSE: UTZ and is well-regarded as a small-cap value and growth equity in the Staples sector.

news.headline: Landsea Homes plans secondary offering of 5,043,480 common stock shares, with potential for additional 756,520 shares.
news.summary: Landsea Homes Corporation (LSEA), a publicly traded residential homebuilder, has announced the commencement of an underwritten public offering of 5,043,480 shares of its common stock by selling stockholders. An additional 756,520 shares may be offered by the selling stockholders to underwriters within a 30-day option. Landsea Homes Corporation will not be selling any shares in this offering. The completion of the proposed Offering is subject to market conditions and uncertainties regarding the size and terms of the Offering.

news.headline: Veeva reports Q3 2025 revenue of $699.2M, up 13% YOY, with subscription services revenue at $580.9M, up 17% YOY.
news.summary: Veeva Systems Inc., a prominent provider of industry cloud solutions for the global life sciences sector based in Pleasanton, California, disclosed their financial performance for the year ending on December 5, 2024. The company reported total revenues of $699.2 million, marking a notable 13% increase compared to the previous year. Additionally, their subscription services revenues specifically showed significant growth, reaching $580.9 million which reflected a substantial 17% rise year over year.

news.headline: lululemon athletica inc. (NASDAQ:LULU) announces Q3 fiscal 2024 results, ending on October 27. CEO pleased with global growth and holiday season start.
news.summary: Vancouver-based company lululemon athletica inc. (NASDAQ:LULU) has reported its financial results for the third quarter of fiscal 2024, ending on October 27, 2024. Calvin McDonald, CEO, highlighted the company's strong global performance during this period, with ongoing growth in international markets and Canada. McDonald expressed satisfaction with the company's performance heading into the holiday season. The specific financial figures for this quarter were not stated in the provided information.

news.headline: Volaris reports November 2024 with a load factor of 87%, serving Mexico, U.S., Central, and South America.
news.summary: In Mexico City on December 5, 2024, Controladora Vuela Compañía de Aviación, S.A.B. de C.V. (NYSE: VLRS and BMV: VOLAR), known as Volaris, a leading ultra-low-cost carrier operating in Mexico, the United States, Central, and South America, announced its preliminary traffic results for November 2024.

news.headline: American Outdoor Brands, Inc. shows Q2 FY25 growth with net sales of $60.2M, up 4.0% Y/Y and GAAP net income of $3.1M.
news.summary: In the latest financial report, the company revealed a significant increase in net sales, reaching $60.2 million, representing a 4.0% year-over-year growth. The gross margin also saw a notable improvement, rising to 48.0%, an increase of 230 basis points. GAAP net income stood at $3.1 million, equivalent to $0.24 per diluted share. On a non-GAAP basis, the net income was reported at $4.9 million, translating to $0.37 per diluted share. Furthermore, the non-GAAP adjusted EBITDAS reached $7.5 million, marking a substantial increase of 42.9%. The company also indicated positive results in traditional channel net sales.

news.headline: Zumiez Inc. reports strong Q3 results: 7.5% sales growth, 140 bps margin increase to 35.2%, EPS at $0.06, with Q4 growth guidance at 6.0% - 7.5%.
news.summary: In the third quarter, there was a 7.5% growth in comparable sales. The gross margin for the same period saw an increase of 140 basis points, reaching 35.2%. Earnings per share also showed positive improvement, rising to $0.06 from a previous figure of ($0.12). Looking ahead to the fourth quarter, there is a projected comparable sales increase of 6.0% to 7.5%.

news.headline: Beauty retailer Ulta reports Q3 Fiscal 2024 results.
news.summary: In recent developments, it has been reported that a record number of 10,000 new COVID-19 cases have been confirmed in the past 24 hours. This spike brings the total number of cases in the country to 150,000. Alongside this rise in cases, there has also been a significant increase in hospitalizations, with 500 new patients admitted in critical condition. Authorities are urging the public to adhere to safety guidelines and protocols in order to mitigate the spread of the virus. Additionally, a total of 1,000 deaths have been recorded as a result of the ongoing pandemic. The government is implementing stricter measures to control the situation, including enhancing testing capabilities and enforcing stricter lockdown protocols in heavily affected regions. Public cooperation is crucial in combating the virus and protecting the community from further harm.

news.headline: Docusign (NASDAQ: DOCU) reports third quarter fiscal 2025 results ended October 31, 2024. More info on investor.docusign.com.
news.summary: On December 5, 2024, in San Francisco, Docusign, Inc. (NASDAQ: DOCU) revealed its financial performance for the fiscal quarter concluding on October 31, 2024. Comprehensive information, including prepared comments and financial findings, will be accessible on Docusign's website, investor.docusign.com, before the...

news.headline: Beneficient to acquire Mercantile Bank International, expanding alternative asset custody services to Puerto Rico.
news.summary: Beneficient has confirmed the acquisition of Mercantile Bank International Corp., an International Financial Entity located in Puerto Rico. This recent agreement marks an advancement for Beneficient in its expansion strategy.

news.headline: The Duckhorn Portfolio reports Q1 2025 net sales of $122.9 million, up $20.4 million (19.9%) YoY. Excluding Sonoma-Cutrer, net sales declined by $8.4 million (8.2%).
news.summary: The Duckhorn Portfolio, Inc. (NYSE: NAPA) based in St. Helena, California, recently disclosed its financial performance for the three months that concluded on October 31, 2024. In Q1 2025, the company reported net sales amounting to $122.9 million, marking a substantial increase of $20.4 million, equivalent to 19.9%, compared to the same period last year. However, when excluding Sonoma-Cutrer from the calculations, net sales saw a decline of $8.4 million, translating to a reduction of 8.2%. This drop in net sales can be attributed to one-time inventory transfers, primarily due to outgoing distributors in particular states transferring stock.

news.headline: First Commonwealth Bank promotes Linda Metzmaier to Chief Risk Officer effective Jan. 1, 2025 due to growth in Legal and Risk teams.
news.summary: In response to expansion and enhancement of its Legal and Risk leadership teams, First Commonwealth Bank based in Indiana, Pennsylvania, announced on December 5, 2024, the promotion of Linda Metzmaier, Deputy Chief Risk and Chief Compliance Officer, to the position of Executive Vice President/Chief Risk Officer, starting from January 1, 2025. This strategic decision aims to strengthen the bank's risk management framework and navigate growth opportunities effectively.

news.headline: RH will report Q3 fiscal 2024 results on Dec 12, 2024 after market close. Includes Chairman's letter and recent performance.
news.summary: Corte Madera, California-based company RH (NYSE: RH) will be releasing their financial results for the third quarter of fiscal 2024, ending on November 2, 2024, on Thursday, December 12, 2024, after the market closes. The press release will feature a shareholder letter from Chairman and CEO Gary Friedman, discussing the company's ongoing development and recent performance. Shareholders can expect to access this information on the company's website following the release.

news.headline: Bitcoin Depot celebrates as Bitcoin hits all-time high of $100,000, reflects growing confidence in crypto.
news.summary: On December 5, 2024, Bitcoin Depot Inc., a prominent U.S.-based Bitcoin ATM operator and fintech company listed on NASDAQ as BTM, marks a significant occasion as Bitcoin reaches a record-high price of over $100,000. This achievement showcases the rising worldwide trust in Bitcoin as a valuable financial asset and demonstrates the growing need for convenient cryptocurrency services.

news.headline: Nasdaq CFO Sarah Youngwood to present at Goldman Sachs U.S. Financial Services Conference on Dec. 05, 2024 (NDAQ).
news.summary: On December 5, 2024, in New York, Nasdaq (Nasdaq: NDAQ) announced its participation in an upcoming conference. The company will be presenting at the event, and a webcast of the presentation will be accessible on Nasdaq's Investor Relations website at ir.nasdaq.com/events.cfm.

news.headline: The Cannabist Company partners with Flower by Edie Parker in Virginia and Colorado, experienced cultivators and retailers.
news.summary: In New York, The Cannabist Company Holdings Inc. (Cboe CA: CBST) (OTCQX: CBSTF) (FSE: 3LP) revealed a collaboration with Flower by Edie Parker, a prominent cannabis lifestyle brand, in Virginia and Colorado. The Cannabist Company is known for its expertise in cultivating, manufacturing, and retailing cannabis products in the United States. The partnership marks the introduction of Flower by Edie Parker’s premium products in the aforementioned states.

news.headline: Cyclacel Pharmaceuticals considering strategic alternatives, reducing costs; exploring potential transaction with investor.
news.summary: Cyclacel Pharmaceuticals, Inc., a company focused on developing cancer medications, revealed plans to quickly consider strategic options to safeguard its finances, including possibly partnering with investor David Lazar from Activist Investing, LLC. The potential transaction, contingent upon approval from a current shareholder, aims to bolster the company's cash reserves. Cyclacel Pharmaceuticals, Inc. is listed on NASDAQ under CYCC and CYCCP.

news.headline: Lovesac Company, Nasdaq: LOVE, to release Q3 2025 financial results on Dec. 12, 2024 before market open. Conference call at 8:30 a.m. ET.
news.summary: A home and technology brand, the Lovesac Company (Nasdaq: LOVE) based in Stamford, Conn., revealed that it is set to announce its financial outcomes for the third quarter of fiscal 2025 on December 12, 2024. The report will be made public before the market opens that day. There will be a conference call held by the Company at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time to delve into the financial findings.

news.headline: Color Star Technology (Nasdaq: ADD) complies with Nasdaq's minimum closing bid price rule by maintaining $1.00/share.
news.summary: On December 5, 2024, Color Star Technology Co., Ltd. (NASDAQ: ADD), an entertainment technology firm emphasizing technology and AI applications in entertainment, revealed it met Nasdaq's requirement of maintaining a minimum bid price of $1.00 per share under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550(a)(2). This notification signifies the Company's restored compliance with the rule, received directly from Nasdaq. Color Star leads with a global network and its ordinary shares are now aligned with the minimum bid price regulation.

news.headline: R. Andrew Eckert named Chairman of the Board at Maravai LifeSciences.
news.summary: In recent reports, it has been stated that there is a significant increase in the number of COVID-19 cases in the region. The latest data shows a total of 1,500 new cases within the past week alone, bringing the total number of confirmed cases to 10,000. The surge in infections has also resulted in a rise in hospitalizations, with 300 new admissions in the last 24 hours. Health officials are expressing concern over the strain this is putting on the healthcare system, urging the public to adhere to safety guidelines and get vaccinated to help curb the spread of the virus. Additionally, it has been noted that the majority of the new cases are among unvaccinated individuals. The situation is being closely monitored as authorities work to control the outbreak.

news.headline: Parsons chosen as lead designer for Newark AirTrain Replacement Program, $1.18 billion project to upgrade EWR.
news.summary: Parsons Corporation disclosed that the Tutor/O&G joint venture, with Parsons as the primary designer, has been chosen by the Port Authority of New York and New Jersey for the Newark AirTrain Replacement Program. Valued at $1.18 billion, this project aims to enhance Newark Liberty International Airport by upgrading the current AirTrain system with an advanced automated people mover. This initiative is part of the airport's efforts to accommodate the increasing passenger demands through modernization.

news.headline: ABM raises dividend by 18% to $0.265 per share from $0.225, boosting shareholder return.
news.summary: The quarterly dividend has been raised to $0.265 per common share, up from the previous $0.225. This increase represents a significant uptick in dividends, providing investors with a higher return on their investment. The adjustment signifies positive financial performance and confidence in the company's ability to sustain and grow its dividend payments. Shareholders can now anticipate a higher payout, reflecting the company's strong financial position and commitment to rewarding its investors.

news.headline: InterDigital (Nasdaq: IDCC) declares $0.45 per share cash dividend, payable on Jan 22, 2025, to shareholders of record on Jan 8, 2025.
news.summary: In Wilmington, Delaware, on December 5, 2024, InterDigital, Inc. (Nasdaq: IDCC), a company specializing in mobile, video, and AI technology research and development, revealed that its Board of Directors has approved a standard quarterly cash dividend of $0.45 for each share of its common stock. This dividend will be distributed on January 22, 2025, to shareholders of record as of the end of business on January 8, 2025.

news.headline: Petco reported Q3 2024 earnings: $1.51 billion revenue, 1.2% growth YoY, $575.8 million profit, but $16.7 million net loss.
news.summary: In the third quarter of 2024, there was a noticeable growth in the financial performance with a net revenue of $1.51 billion, showcasing a 1.2 percent increase compared to the previous year. Comparable sales also saw a rise by 1.8 percent year over year. The gross profit amounted to $575.8 million, indicating a significant 4.7 percent increase from the previous year's $550.0 million. However, there was a GAAP net loss of $16.7 million during this period.

news.headline: Cohu to join 13th NYC Investor Conference on Dec 17, 2024 at Mastro’s New York. Presentation material on company's website.
news.summary: Cohu, Inc., a leading semiconductor manufacturing yield and productivity optimization equipment and services provider, disclosed that it will be represented at the 13th Annual NYC Summit Investor Conference, scheduled for December 17, 2024, at Mastro’s New York. During the event, management will participate, and the presentation material shared will be available for access on the investor section of Cohu’s website at www.cohu.com. This conference signifies an opportunity for Cohu to engage with investors and showcase its strategic initiatives and business performance to a wider audience.

news.headline: Rubrik Inc. announces Q3 FY2025 results, exceeding $1 billion in Subscription ARR with 38% year-over-year growth.
news.summary: Rubrik, Inc., a leading Zero Trust Data Security™ company based in Palo Alto, California, revealed its financial performance for the third quarter of fiscal year 2025, concluding on October 31, 2024. The company, listed as RBRK on NYSE, celebrated surpassing $1 billion in Subscription Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR), marking a substantial 38% year-over-year growth. Achieving this milestone in just over a decade since its establishment showcases Rubrik's rapid progress. The company's robust expansion demonstrates its dominance in the cyber resilience sector.

news.headline: Stocks take a pause as Dow closes under 45K before jobs report; market update with significant drop.
Credit Acceptance increased Warehouse Facility V from $200 million to $250 million, extended revolving date and maturity, and reduced interest rate.
news.summary: Southfield, Michigan, December 05, 2024 - Credit Acceptance Corporation (Nasdaq: CACC) announced an increase in the amount of Warehouse Facility V, a revolving secured warehouse facility, from $200.0 million to $250.0 million. The date for the Facility to cease revolving has been extended to December 29, 2027, and the maturity date is now December 27, 2029. The interest rate on borrowings under the Facility has been reduced from SOFR + 245 basis points to SOFR + 185 basis points.
